{% render 'card', heading: 'Feature 1', content: 'Description 1', tag: 'new' %} {% render 'card', heading: 'Feature 2', content: 'Description 2', tag: 'popular' %} {% render 'card', heading: site.featureName, content: site.featureDesc, tag: 'beta' %}
{% render 'button', label: 'Save', type: 'primary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Cancel', type: 'secondary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Delete', type: 'danger' %}
